title: Issue a Certificate for a Kubernetes API Client Using A CertificateSigningRequest — What's next
text:
Read
Manage TLS Certificates in a Cluster
For details of X.509 itself, refer to
RFC 5280
section 3.1
For information on the syntax of PKCS#10 certificate signing requests, refer to
RFC 2986
Read about
ClusterTrustBundles

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
